name: Cotswold Park Barns

location.full_address: Cotswold Park Barns, Woodmancote, Cirencester, GL7 7EL

dogs_details: Dogs allowed at a small charge per night per dog. No animals allowed in bedrooms.

price.notes: Exclusive hire basis - pricing not publicly listed. Contact property directly.

key_features.games_notes: No games room. No snooker, pool, or table tennis. Outdoor tennis court available May-September.
indoor: 6 en suite bedrooms in The Dairy
4 en suite bedrooms in The Hay Barn
Large dining room for 22 in The Threshing Barn

description: Original dairy buildings belonging to Cotswold Park House, converted into luxury accommodation in the heart of the Cotswolds, close to Cheltenham and Cirencester.
notes: No games room at all. Good for outdoor activities (pool, tennis) but lacks indoor games.

name: Overcliff Lodge
dogs_details: 3 well-behaved dogs allowed. Additional dogs may be allowed at owner's discretion for an additional fee.

price.notes: Pricing varies by season - check booking sites for current rates. No booking fees or commission when booking direct via groupaccommodation.com.

key_features.games_notes: Separate games room at far end of house with pool table, Wii, and TV. Views to garden via patio doors. No table tennis or snooker.
outdoor: 100 yards from blue flag sandy beach
indoor: Games room with pool table and Wii

description: Large award-winning Victorian family holiday home on two levels, 100 yards from a blue flag sandy beach on the North Norfolk Heritage Coast.
notes: Seaside location is a big draw. Games room has pool table but no snooker or table tennis.

name: The Barns

location.full_address: The Barns at Upper House, Lyonshall, Kington, Herefordshire, HR5 3JN
location.directions: Outskirts of Lyonshall village, on Spond Lane accessed off the A480 Hereford road

dogs_details: 2 well-behaved dogs welcome. Outdoor taps for muddy paws, fabulous walks from door, garden entirely enclosed for dog safety.

price.notes: Prices shown are for full estate (48 guests). Contact for Stables & Granary (sleeps 20) pricing.

key_features.games_notes: Games rooms with table tennis, table football, air hockey, and pool table. Best games selection of the requested properties.
outdoor: Glorious Herefordshire walks from the door
indoor: Luxury stone barn conversions on family farm

description: Beautifully furnished stone barn conversions on a family farm in Herefordshire. Bookable as Stables & Granary (sleeps 20) or full estate (sleeps 48).
notes: BEST games selection of all requested properties: table tennis, table football, air hockey, and pool table. Dog-friendly with enclosed garden. Can scale from 20 to 48 guests.

name: Walcot Hall

location.full_address: Walcot Hall, Walcot, Nr. Alkborough, North Lincolnshire, DN15 9JT

sleeps: 22 (main hall) or up to 28 with Yurt and Lodge
dogs_details: Up to 2 well-behaved dogs per unit. Dogs cost £20 per night. Must be kept to ground floor, kept on lead outside.

price.notes: Various accommodation options (Hall, Yurt, Lodge) with different pricing.

key_features.games_notes: No games kept on site. Property can provide space for guests to bring own games - notify when booking.

property_type: Grade II listed Georgian country house
description: Privately owned Grade II listed Georgian Hall built in 1726, set in 27 acres of stunning countryside in the historic North Lincolnshire village of Alkborough.
notes: No games on site at all - guests must bring their own. Beautiful historic property with tennis court and hot tub. Good for weddings/corporate events.

name: Garden House

location.car_park_postcode: PE9 2LS (off Kettering Road on Pinfold Lane)
location.full_address: 42 High Street, St Martins, Stamford, PE9 2LP

sleeps: Up to 42 (listed as 49 on groupaccommodation.com but other sources say 42 across 20 en suite rooms)

price.includes: Sole use for up to 42 guests
price.midweek: Available nightly; individuals and couples can book by room

key_features.games_notes: Dedicated games room with pool table and selection of other activities. No snooker or table tennis mentioned.

description: Beautiful stone Georgian building on the edge of Stamford, formerly a hotel, now offering luxury self-catering accommodation. Opposite Burghley Park. Walking distance to historic Stamford centre.
notes: Largest capacity property on this list (42 guests). Dogs free of charge. Games room with pool table. Very flexible booking (sole use weekends, room-by-room midweek). Great value at £800-1100/night for up to 42 guests.

name: Penbridge Court Estate

location.full_address: Penbridge Court, Trebles Holford, Taunton, Somerset, TA4 3HA

sleeps: 20 (main barn), up to 28 with all 4 cottages
dogs_details: Up to 3 dogs welcome. £50 for first dog, £25 for additional dogs, up to £100 maximum.

price.notes: Price varies by season and unit. Hot tub costs £100 extra.
price.period: Per booking (not specified if weekend or weekly)

key_features.games_notes: Games room with pool table for rainy days. No snooker or table tennis mentioned.
indoor: Converted threshing barn (~1800) with 3 farm cottages

description: Beautifully restored converted threshing barn with three farm cottages around a central courtyard, on the edge of the Quantock Hills AONB near Taunton.
notes: Somerset option with pool table games room. Child, golfer and dog friendly. No snooker - for snooker in Somerset see the Axbridge Georgian Manor.

name: Somerset Georgian Manor (Axbridge)

location.note: Exact property name could not be confirmed from search results - listed on the Axbridge location page of groupaccommodation.com

dogs_allowed: Unknown - not confirmed in search results

price.notes: Not available from search results. Contact via groupaccommodation.com.

key_features.games_notes: Dedicated snooker room. Only property in this list with confirmed snooker.

description: Somerset Georgian manor sleeping 20 in 10 bedrooms with luxury spa, tennis court, snooker room, nature trail and putting green.
notes: Only property with confirmed SNOOKER room. Also has spa, tennis, nature trail and putting green. Could not confirm exact property name, dog policy, or pricing.

name: The Crescent

location.full_address: The Crescent, Mortehoe, Woolacombe, Devon, EX34 7DX

sleeps: 8-20 (2 adjacent houses: The Buttery sleeps 2-10, Cromlech House sleeps 2-10, each with additional sofa bed)
dogs_details: Dogs allowed. Excellent area for dog walking. Dogs must be kept off soft furnishings and carpets.

price.notes: Not publicly listed - contact property via enquiry form.

key_features.games_notes: Tennis and games room available within 6 acres of grounds. Specific games room equipment not detailed in search results.

description: 2 dog-friendly adjacent houses in the heart of Mortehoe village, sleeping 20 total, with sea views, 6 acres and games room, near beaches and Exmoor.
notes: Dog-friendly Devon option. Unique setup as 2 adjacent houses. Great coastal/outdoor location. Games room and tennis confirmed but specific games equipment unknown. UNESCO Biosphere reserve and AONB area.

name: Ewe Time Holiday Barn
dogs_details: Dogs welcome by prior arrangement. Secure rear garden backing onto grazing fields. Dogs must not be left unattended, not allowed in bedrooms, kitchen, dining areas, or on furniture.

key_features.games_notes: No separate games room. The 30ft living room includes a pool table and dartboard alongside seating for 20+ and a wood-burning stove.
indoor: 4 ground floor bedrooms (1 adapted for disabled guests)

description: Lovingly restored 18th century barn on the Lancashire-Yorkshire border, sleeping 20 with a pool table, hot tub, and secure dog-friendly garden.
notes: Lancashire/Yorkshire border option. Pool table and darts in living room but no dedicated games room. Dog-friendly with secure garden. Disabled-accessible bedroom on ground floor.
